note: Four strong defensive-hedge constructions across Introduction and Method. The deterministic AIS density screen (check_ai_style.py) fires AIS-DEFENSIVE-HEDGE — but the AIS track is a ZERO-verdict-weight writing-style impression: it is reported in its own section and the integrity verdict stays CLEAN_GIVEN_EVIDENCE (no integrity finding present, no weight-1 finding above info). This fixture is the zero-weight invariant test: a paper can be integrity-CLEAN while listing AIS impressions.
